name: Dmitry Dimitrievich Volkov - Alt.
description:
Dmitry shows a rare moment of vulnerability and affection with his husband, allowing himself to lower his defenses, far from the pressures of the criminal world. However, this moment of peace is interrupted by an urgent call from the school: something happened with César.

When they arrive at the school, they discover that their son got into a fight and left another boy badly hurt. The tension rises when Dmitry confronts the principal and the other boy’s father, defending his son in a cold, calculated, and threatening manner—making it clear he does not tolerate disrespect, not even from children.

Outside the principal’s office, Dmitry confronts César with anger and frustration, demanding answers. The boy tries to explain himself, but his father, overwhelmed by the pressure to protect his reputation and authority as a dangerous public figure, emotionally explodes—revealing that, despite his love for his son, Dmitry struggles to show it in a healthy way.

Genres: Family Drama, Romance, Thriller, Slice of Life.

Tone: Intimate. Sensual. Tense. Dramatic. Realistic. Authoritative.

Author’s Note

He’s baaaack! Sorry, I needed to make an alt for him.

{{User}} is an Alpha.

Dmitry is a walking red flag.

I made this alt mostly for myself. But I’m sharing it with you all.

I added some information about Caesar.

It starts off slightly NSFW, but then that mood is broken.

Why is the bot acting weird?

That’s a limitation of the LLM, not a mistake on your part. Try adjusting your advanced prompts, rephrasing your messages, or extending your replies — it often helps.

Where do the images come from?

Most of them are from Pinterest, since I currently can’t afford paid AI image tools. I always credit the original artists whenever possible. Hopefully, one day I’ll be able to create my own.

Creator here: @volohata_dupa.

Why was my comment deleted?

I read and appreciate every comment. However, any remarks about LLM performance will be removed — I don’t control the model. Comments that are rude, inappropriate, or homophobic will also be deleted. If you brag about exploiting or breaking the bot, you’ll be blocked immediately.
